register.heroDescription: Register a candidate account to follow programs, update your profile, and connect with suitable companies.

register.recruiterHint: Are you a recruiter? After creating an account, request verification to receive permissions.

register.missingSession: No login session was returned after verification.

resetPasswordDialog.success: A password reset code has been sent if the email exists.
resetPasswordDialog.sendError: Could not send the password reset email
resetPasswordDialog.title: Forgot password
resetPasswordDialog.description: Enter your email. We will send an 8-digit verification code to reset the password if the email exists.
resetPasswordDialog.missingSession: No password reset session was returned after verification.
resetPasswordDialog.updateSuccess: Password has been updated. Please log in again.

resetPasswordPage.title: Reset password
resetPasswordPage.expired: The password reset link has expired. Please send a new request.
resetPasswordPage.accessDenied: Access denied. The link is invalid or has expired.
resetPasswordPage.invalidLink: The link is invalid. Please send another password reset request.
resetPasswordPage.missingSession: No login session was found from the link. Please reopen the link from your email or send another password reset request.
resetPasswordPage.updateSuccess: Password has been updated. Please log in again.
resetPasswordPage.noValidSession: No valid session is available to reset the password.

home.heroDescription: Find internships, part-time jobs, and career opportunities from leading companies.
home.aboutIntro: This is an internship project by students from Ho Chi Minh University of Technology (HCMUT) and Saigon University (SGU) working at MSC Center. Inspired by LinkedIn and TopCV, InternHiring aims to help users find job opportunities, especially internships for Vietnamese students, through a simple bilingual web platform.
home.aboutIntroLong: InternHiring was developed during an industry-affiliated internship at MSC Center by students from HCMUT and SGU. The platform takes inspiration from established career services like LinkedIn and TopCV and focuses on practical features: a bilingual UI, employer verification, partner showcases, and curated internship listings to help students discover relevant opportunities.
home.aboutCardProjectBody: A student-built internship project developed at MSC Center by teams from Ho Chi Minh University of Technology (HCMUT) and Saigon University (SGU).
home.aboutMission: To connect students and employers, simplify internship discovery, and support career development by delivering a reliable, easy-to-use bilingual platform.
home.aboutValues: Accessibility, collaboration, and practical impact — we design with students and employers in mind, prioritizing usability and real-world usefulness.
home.featuredJobsEmpty: Featured jobs will be populated from job view analytics in a future update.
home.recruiterCtaTitle: Are you a recruiter? Verify with us to continue.
home.footer: © 2026 InternHiring MSC Center. All rights reserved.
